summary: Evidence Dashboard Bug Fix VERIFIED - Both backend API and frontend UI tests pass. The fix correctly addresses: (1) Wrong data path (evidenceData.evidence → evidenceData.participants), (2) Organizer filter removed (!p.is_organizer → status-based filter). Real appointment bb90f3e8 now shows evidence for both Test Audit (organizer) and Igaal Hanouna (participant) with GPS, time, distance, and address.

backend_api_tests: ✅ Each participant has correct structure (participant_id, evidence array, aggregation)
✅ Organizer evidence NOT filtered out (bug fix verified)
✅ Evidence items have required fields (evidence_id, source, source_timestamp, confidence_score)
✅ Real appointment bb90f3e8 has 2 evidence items (Test Audit + Igaal Hanouna)
✅ Temporal details present ('Arrivé 12min avant le RDV', 'Arrivé 11min avant le RDV')
✅ API response matches frontend's expected data path (evidenceData.participants)
✅ Backend returns all accepted participants (no is_organizer filter)
frontend_ui_tests: ✅ 'Preuves de présence' section found and expandable
✅ NO 'Aucune preuve' displayed (bug was showing this for all)
✅ Temporal info displayed ('Arrivé 12min avant le RDV')

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix correctly implemented in EvidenceDashboard.js
Line 42-46: getParticipantEvidence now uses evidenceData.participants instead of evidenceData.evidence
Line 56: Filter changed from !p.is_organizer to status-based filter ['accepted', 'accepted_pending_guarantee', 'accepted_guaranteed']
Backend API /api/checkin/evidence/{appointment_id} returns correct structure with participants array
seed_data_creation: Used existing evidence data in appointment bb90f3e8
context_for_next_testing_agent: Evidence Dashboard bug fix verified. The fix ensures: (1) Frontend uses correct data path evidenceData.participants[].evidence, (2) Organizer is NOT filtered out from display. Test appointment bb90f3e8 has 2 participants with GPS evidence - Test Audit (org) and Igaal Hanouna (participant).

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Evidence Dashboard was showing 'Aucune preuve' for all participants despite evidence existing in database
root_causes: 1) EvidenceDashboard.js used wrong data path: evidenceData.evidence instead of evidenceData.participants[].evidence
2) Organizer was filtered out with !p.is_organizer filter
fixes_applied: 1) Changed getParticipantEvidence to use evidenceData.participants.find(p => p.participant_id === participantId)?.evidence
2) Changed filter from !p.is_organizer to status-based filter
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Backend API tests (10 tests) + Frontend UI tests with Playwright
